input: Build a REST API endpoint to create users with email validation, password hashing, and JWT token generation in Node.js/Express

output.api_contract:
openapi: 3.0.0
paths:
  /users:
    post:
      summary: Create user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password, name]
              properties:
                email: { type: string, format: email }
                password: { type: string, minLength: 8 }
                name: { type: string }
      responses:
        201:
          description: User created
        409:
          description: Email exists

input: Create a paginated API endpoint to list products with filtering by category and sorting by price/name
Implement JWT authentication middleware for Express with token refresh and logout handling
Build a database migration system for PostgreSQL with up/down migrations and rollback support
Create a WebSocket server for real-time notifications with connection management and reconnection handling
Implement a Redis caching layer with cache-aside pattern and TTL management
Build a rate limiting middleware using Redis sliding window algorithm
Create an async job queue system with BullMQ for processing background tasks
Implement GraphQL resolver with DataLoader for efficient N+1 query prevention
Build an Express error handling middleware with centralized error types and logging
